title: Roots
claim: A root is a value which, when multiplied by itself a specified number of times, produces a given quantity.
proof: If xⁿ = a, then x is an nth root of a, reversing the exponentiation relation.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic/algebraic contexts.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by finding the side length of a square from its area.
